## Description

 - [ ] Create basic UI with XML
 - [ ] Apply `ConstraintLayout`, `Material Design components`
 - [ ] Implement `ViewModel`, `LiveData`, `StateFlow`
 - [ ] Setup `Navigation Component`
 - [ ] Connect `Data Binding` / `View Binding`

## Type of change

 - [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds a new feature)
 - [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
 - [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
 - [ ] Refactor (code change that neither fixes a bug nor adds a feature)
 - [ ] Documentation (changes to documentation only)
 - [ ] Setup (project-level setup/configs like Firebase, Proguard)
 - [ ] Hotfix (critical fix deployed directly to production branch)
